default_company.hero_title: Find Your Next Drive With Veep.
default_company.hero_subtitle: Browse the fleet, build a quick SGD estimate, and submit your interest with Yobo.

demo_insurance.name: Essential Cover
demo_insurance.description: Basic protection for everyday city driving.

demo_insurance.name: Premium Shield
demo_insurance.description: Extended coverage with reduced excess and roadside support.

demo_insurance.name: Luxury Guard
demo_insurance.description: Maximum coverage tailored for premium vehicles.

customer_detail_fields.description: Collect an email address for confirmations and follow-up.
Capture the customer area or pincode before the team follows up.
Ask what vehicle the customer currently drives or needs help with.
Ask whether the enquiry is daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.
Capture the current contract company or the workshop issue details.
Ask when the customer's current contract expires.
Capture citizen or resident status when the business needs it.

marketing_plans.name: Free
marketing_plans.description: A fast way to launch your first Yobobot booking site on a Yobobot subdomain.

marketing_plans.name: Professional
marketing_plans.description: For growing businesses that want more control, integrations, and team usage.

marketing_plans.name: Business
marketing_plans.description: For larger fleets and multi-employee teams that need deeper workflow support.

marketing_plans.name: Enterprise
marketing_plans.description: For custom rollouts, advanced controls, larger fleets, and white-glove onboarding.

integration_guides.title: Google Calendar
integration_guides.description: Sync booking events with each business's own Google Calendar so teams can avoid clashes and review upcoming reservations.
integration_guides.summary: Connect the business Google account, choose the working calendar, and let Yobobot use it for bookings and scheduling visibility.
benefits: Keep booking events in the business calendar
steps: Open the onboarding or integrations area and choose Google Calendar.
Sign in with the business Google account that should own the calendar.
Approve calendar access and select the working calendar for that business.
Save the connection so Yobobot can sync bookings and availability workflows.

integration_guides.title: Google Meet
integration_guides.description: Attach Meet links when a business wants consultation calls, premium walkthroughs, or workshop appointment discussions.
integration_guides.summary: Connect the business Google workspace, decide which workflows need a Meet link, and let Yobobot attach it during booking or follow-up flows.
benefits: Auto-create meeting links for demos or consultations
Keep calls tied to the business workspace
Useful for workshop and support follow-ups
steps: Choose Google Meet during onboarding or from the integrations page.
Authorize the business Google workspace that should create meeting links.
Select when Yobobot should generate Meet links, such as demos or consultation calls.
Review the saved connection inside the dashboard before going live.

integration_guides.title: Zoom
integration_guides.description: Let each business connect its own Zoom workspace for customer calls, walkthroughs, or premium support appointments.
integration_guides.summary: Authorize the business Zoom account, choose the host behavior, and control how Yobobot creates meeting links for the team.
benefits: Meeting links for support and demos
steps: Open Zoom setup from onboarding or the integrations section.
Sign in with the business Zoom account that should host meetings.
Approve the workspace connection and review the default host settings.
Save the integration so Yobobot can attach Zoom links when the workflow needs them.

integration_guides.title: GPay
integration_guides.description: Configure business-specific Google Pay details so each company can show its own payment instructions and receive deposits separately.
integration_guides.summary: Add the business UPI or payment identity, save the payment instructions, and use them during onboarding, deposits, and follow-up flows.
benefits: Separate payment setup for every business
Useful for deposits or confirmation payments
Fits the onboarding and dashboard setup flow
steps: Open the GPay setup step during onboarding or from the dashboard integrations area.
Add the business payment identity, such as the UPI or business payment label.
Review how payment instructions should appear to customers during booking follow-up.
Save the payment configuration so the business uses its own payment details.

veep.hero_title: Find Your Next Drive With Veep.
veep.hero_subtitle: Browse the fleet, build a quick SGD estimate, and submit your interest with Yobo.

intro_messages: Hello I'm {assistant_name}! Your AI-powered booking assistant.
flow.name_complete: Nice to meet you {first_name}. What is your mobile number?
flow.phone_reprompt: Please enter your mobile number next.
flow.email_reprompt: Please enter your email address next.
flow.zipcode_complete: What is your current vehicle type?
flow.vehicle_type_reprompt: Please tell me your current vehicle type.
flow.vehicle_type_complete: How long would you like the enquiry to run for? Please choose your from and to dates.
flow.interest_type_prompt: What should I note as your interest form type?
flow.contract_company_reprompt: Please tell me your current contract company.
flow.contract_company_complete: Please select your current contract expiry date.
flow.citizen_prompt: Please choose one of these options: Yes, Yes Permanent Resident, or No.
flow.fleet_intro: Great! Now it's time for you to choose your dream car! If you'd like, I could suggest a car tailored to your needs.
flow.review_intro: Before you submit, please review your enquiry details.
flow.completion_message: Thank you. One of our consultants will contact you soon to continue your {company_name} enquiry.

secondbrand.hero_title: Find Your Next Drive With Second Brand.
secondbrand.hero_subtitle: Browse the fleet and submit your enquiry in minutes.

intro_messages: Please tell me your full name.
flow.name_reprompt: Let's get some basic details before we start. Please tell me your full name
flow.name_complete: Thanks {first_name}. What is your mobile number?
flow.email_reprompt: Please enter the email address for this enquiry.
flow.zipcode_complete: Let's lock in the dates first. Please choose your from and to dates.
flow.fleet_intro: Perfect. I'll now show the fleet available for those dates, and I can recommend one if you want.
flow.quote_intro: Here's the current estimate for this enquiry.
flow.review_intro: Let's review the enquiry details before you submit.
flow.completion_message: Thank you. The {company_name} team will review this enquiry and get back to you shortly.

mechanicappointments.hero_title: Book Your Next Garage Visit In Minutes.
mechanicappointments.hero_subtitle: Choose a service, share your vehicle details, and request a mechanic appointment through Yobo.
mechanicappointments.browse_subtitle: Browse the available services here. To request an appointment, continue with Yobo.

service_catalog.name: Oil Change
service_catalog.description: Fresh oil, filter replacement, and a quick inspection.

service_catalog.name: Brake Inspection
service_catalog.description: Brake pad, rotor, and fluid check with follow-up recommendations.

service_catalog.name: Battery Check
service_catalog.description: Battery health test, charging check, and replacement advice if needed.

service_catalog.name: General Diagnostic
service_catalog.description: Tell us the issue and the garage will inspect the vehicle.

intro_messages: Please tell me your full name.
flow.name_reprompt: Please tell me your full name.
flow.name_complete: Thanks {first_name}. What is your mobile number?
flow.email_complete: Which area, zip code, or postcode should we note for this appointment?
flow.zipcode_placeholder: Type your area or zip code...
flow.zipcode_reprompt: Please enter your area, zip code, or postcode.
flow.zipcode_complete: What vehicle should the garage expect?
flow.vehicle_type_reprompt: Please tell me your vehicle make and model.
flow.vehicle_type_complete: Please describe the service you need or the issue you're noticing.
flow.contract_company_reprompt: Please describe the service you need or the issue you're noticing.
flow.contract_company_complete: Please choose your preferred appointment date and time.
flow.dates_prompt: Please choose your preferred appointment date and time.
flow.dates_note: Choose the best date and time for your appointment request.
flow.dates_invalid: Please choose your preferred appointment date.
flow.time_slot_invalid: Please choose your preferred appointment time.
flow.fleet_intro: Thanks. Please choose the service you'd like to request.
flow.review_intro: Let's review your appointment request before you send it.
flow.summary_note: Your appointment request will be shared with the garage team together with the details above.
flow.completion_message: Thank you. The {company_name} team will review your appointment request and contact you to confirm it.
flow.missing_biz: This {company_name} appointment link is missing business details. Please use the correct business link before continuing.
